channel.title: Graphics on mypersBLOG
channel.description: Recent content in Graphics on mypersBLOG

item.title: Building a GLSL Shader Pack with a Full Deferred Rendering Pipeline
item.description: How I built UltraRealism — a custom GLSL shader pack for Minecraft with deferred rendering, PBR, screen-space path tracing, and TAA — and the driver-level debugging that was most of the work.
